properties.remark: Mesonet station WY40 7.5 S Chugwater (WYDOT). Sustained winds of 36 MPH gusting to 55 MPH with visibility reported at under one quarter mile.
Spotter reported a measured wind gust of 60 MPH at the intersection of Five Rocks and Robidoux Road along with significant blowing snow.
Mesonet station KGUN Gun Barrel (WYDOT) Sustained winds of 35 MPH gusting to 47 MPH with visibility under one quarter mile in falling and blowing snow.
Mesonet station WY46 9.7 E Cheyenne (WYDOT) Sustained winds of 32 MPH gusting to 53 MPH with visibility measured at 0.33 miles due to falling and blwoing snow.

WYDOT sensor along Interstate 80 reported 47 MPH gust with visibility down to 0.12 miles. Visibility stayed below one-quarter mile for approximately 20 minutes. Webcams showed blowing snow and near-zero visibility.

WYDOT sensor along Interstate 80 reported 50 MPH wind gust with 0.18 mile visibility. Visibility remained below one-quarter mile for approximately 10 minutes. Webcams showed near-zero visibility with blowing snow.
WYDOT sensor at Halleck Ridge reports 50 MPH wind gusts with visibility below one-quarter mile. Visibility fell to 0.15 miles with a rapid drop in temperature.
KRWL down between 1/4 to 1/2 miles visibility from 5:05pm through 5:30 PM with winds gusting between 40 and 45 mph.
